execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
let n = lines.len()
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let len = string.len(line)
    if len == 0
      print("")
    else
      let category = if len <= 3
        "short"
      else if len <= 7
        "medium"
      else
        "long"
      end
      println("#{line} -> #{category}")
    end
  when None
    print("")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
